# Initialize a stable topology for gather-handshake testing.
/spawn worker A "You are node A. Do not spawn child agents. Stay idle and wait for follow-up."
/spawn worker B "You are node B. Do not spawn child agents. Stay idle and wait for follow-up."
/spawn worker C "You are node C. Do not spawn child agents. Stay idle and wait for follow-up."

/spawn worker A1 "You are node A1. Do not spawn child agents. Stay idle and wait for follow-up." under A@default
/spawn worker A2 "You are node A2. Do not spawn child agents. Stay idle and wait for follow-up." under A@default

/spawn worker A21 "You are node A21. Do not spawn child agents. Stay idle and wait for follow-up." under A2@default
/spawn worker A22 "You are node A22. Do not spawn child agents. Stay idle and wait for follow-up." under A2@default
/spawn worker A23 "You are node A23. Do not spawn child agents. Stay idle and wait for follow-up." under A2@default

# Run the recursive gather example against the A subtree.
/gather --spec gather_handshake A@default "collect handshake"
